comment.body: That is generally how I read it.  She says "if vol catches up," so I interpret that not necessarily as positive vs negative but *relative to* the local vol at that time.  So if we start to see a meaningful uptick in Alma's vol indicator and then we'll see some increase in that RV Change% number.  I'm no wizard but that's how I interpret.  And of course watch price action there.
